transfer_bonuses.details: Transfer 60K Marriott points, receive 25K miles + 25% bonus = 31,250 miles
40% bonus on transfers from Amex MR to Avios
transfer_bonuses.value_tip: 1000 MR = 1400 Avios instead of 1000. Excellent for short-haul redemptions.

transfer_bonuses.details: Standard transfer always available: 2 RP = 1 KrisFlyer mile via SmartBuy
transfer_bonuses.value_tip: No bonus needed — this is already the best use of HDFC points

card_offers.value: Effectively 33 RP per ₹150 spent = 22% reward rate
card_offers.tip: Use SmartBuy for all flight and hotel bookings

card_offers.offer: 3X EDGE Miles on travel portal bookings
card_offers.value: 15 EDGE Miles per ₹200 = 7.5% reward rate on travel
card_offers.tip: Book via Axis Travel portal for maximum earning

card_offers.value: 25 MR per ₹100 spent on travel = 12.5% effective
card_offers.tip: Use Amex travel portal for domestic flights

hotel_promotions.details: Book award stays now, earn points later. Reserve before you have the points.
hotel_promotions.tip: Lock in availability at current rates while accumulating points

hotel_promotions.details: Earn double points on stays June-September 2026
hotel_promotions.tip: Register for the promotion before your first stay

hotel_promotions.details: Earn 3X points on stays at select Hyatt brands

point_purchase_deals.worth_it: Yes if you have a specific high-value redemption planned (1+ cpp)
Rarely — only for Category 1-4 stays with 5th night free
